description_long: This helmet features a futuristic, high-tech design with a large, dark-tinted visor that covers the entire front and top, providing extensive facial and cranial protection. The shell is predominantly white with visible scuffs, scratches, and weathering, suggesting heavy use or rugged durability. Prominent mechanical components, such as reinforced side modules and flexible tubing, are attached to both sides, possibly for communication or ventilation. The front displays illuminated blue and green circular elements, hinting at integrated electronics or HUD systems. The rear is smooth and rounded, with embedded metallic details and small ports. The overall construction appears robust, blending advanced polymers, metal reinforcements, and transparent composites for the visor.
description: A futuristic, white helmet with a full dark visor, mechanical side modules, and illuminated blue-green front elements, showing signs of rugged use.
description_view_0: Front view highlights the large dark visor, illuminated blue-green circular elements, and intricate mechanical details on the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the weathered white shell, side module with tubing, and the curvature of the visor.
description_view_2: Rear view shows a smooth, rounded white surface with embedded metallic details and no visible visor.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, displaying the side module, tubing, and scuffed white shell.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: No visible vents; side modules may contain integrated ventilation but no explicit openings are present.
attribute_graphic_design: The helmet features a weathered, industrial look with scuffs and scratches, geometric panel lines, and illuminated blue-green elements; no distinct motifs or text.
